name: Orange Country Style Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ribs into 1 rib portions.
2. For the sauce, combine all remaining ingredients; mix well.
3. Place a large piece of foil over the coals beneath the grill to catch drippings.
4. Place the ribs on the grill, about 6 inches above the slow coals.
5. Close the hood of the grill and cook for 20 minutes.
6. Turn the ribs and cook, covered, for another 20 minutes.
7. Brush the ribs with sauce and continue cooking, covered, for an additional 25-35 minutes or until done. Be sure to turn and baste frequently with sauce. Watch carefully so the ribs do not burn.
